description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The structure is surrounded by a large, fenced yard with green grass, a driveway, and two parked vehicles—one under a wooden carport and another in an open area. The front facade features a small porch with a gate, and the rear yard includes a small shed and stepping stones leading to it. Windows are arranged in a linear, asymmetrical pattern along the sides, and the main entrance is centrally located at the front. The exterior is predominantly white, with accents of wood and blue on the carport and vehicles.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white bungalow with a large fenced yard, carport, and shed, featuring asymmetrical windows and a small front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch, driveway with a blue car under a wooden carport, and fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large grassy backyard, stepping stones, shed, and a white car parked outside the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the shed, stepping stones, and the back of the bungalow with visible windows and yard space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, blue car, and the open layout of the backyard with both sheds visible.
